title: nephrodium thelypteroides
intro: Nephrodium thelypteroides, also known as the lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium thelypteroides include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the treatment of various respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Nephrodium thelypteroides can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
